evidence: data/raw/api_matches.json has 1218 fixtures but matches_league_filtered.csv keeps 113; enrichers target only tier_rank <= 2, leaving many rows without enrichment
risk: Coverage varies by competition and the pipeline gates by a hand-built allowlist, but does not use API league coverage metadata to know which data families are reliable
mitigation: Add per-league/season coverage profile from /leagues and observed endpoint hit rates; store coverage flags by feature family.

evidence: matches.csv and matches_league_filtered.csv show home_xg_for/home_sot_for/home_big_for/home_absences/home_motivation non-null and zero for every row inspected
risk: Zeros mean missing, not true zero; score_matches_v3 counts old_core non-null values toward old_data_count/data_quality_score
mitigation: Convert unsupported placeholders to NaN plus explicit availability flags, or exclude old_core from data_quality until statistics/injuries are real.

evidence: Current filtered file has odds_context_v3_status OK and NO_ODDS_FOUND; 86 of 113 filtered rows have odds_1_home_v3 and 3 enriched target rows have zero bookmaker counts
risk: NO_ODDS rows can pass earlier ranking stages and only fail/degrade later; missing odds may reflect lower market coverage and higher uncertainty
mitigation: Propagate odds_available/odds_market_depth into selection eligibility and confidence, not just final edge calculation.

evidence: Standings endpoint returns group/description/home/away splits, but model uses all-table rank and applies generic damping for continental World competitions
risk: Cup/group/playoff tables and domestic league tables are not equivalent; rank/urgency can be misleading in knockouts or early-season small samples
mitigation: Use standings group/description/update and league round; add minimum played and competition-format flags.

evidence: enrich_recent_form_v2 intentionally uses TEAM + SEASON without league filter and stores TEAM_LAST_8_ALL_COMPETITIONS
risk: All-competition form can mix domestic, continental, cup, and friendly/noisy contexts depending API return and season fallback
mitigation: Add opponent/competition weighting, home-away split, and league/fixture-type filters; record number of same-competition fixtures.

risk_area: Injuries/lineups absent but treated as clean
evidence: client has injuries and lineups helpers but no production call; home_absences/away_absences are zero-filled
risk: Model under-penalizes teams with key missing players and cannot detect rotation; missing data is indistinguishable from no absences
mitigation: Create injury availability features and separate unknown from zero absences; near-kickoff lineup layer should not backfill unavailable early matches with zero risk.

evidence: /fixtures/statistics has only one cache row from check_api_plan; SOT/xG/big placeholders are not sourced
risk: Model relies on goals-only recent form and misses process quality signals; goals-only can be noisy over 8 matches
mitigation: Backfill finished fixture statistics for recent fixtures and derive rolling shots/SOT/corners/card/possession features with coverage flags.

evidence: check_api_plan probes /leagues, /fixtures/statistics, /fixtures/lineups, but production scripts do not branch on those capabilities
risk: Available paid layers can be silently left unused; plan/coverage drift is not monitored in normal runs
mitigation: Add automated audit/coverage report after pipeline runs with endpoint hit rates and feature fill rates.
